The face has an almost elven look, with its delicately pointed ears and almond- shaped eyes. Combat

It is quite happy in its life's work, and delights in finding new and novel ways to lie and mislead
[PDF_PAGE 41 | score=5] MC14 Ld Smoke Mephit Smoke mephits are crude and lazy. They spend most of their time sitting around invisible, smoking pipe weed, telling bad jokes about their creators, and generally shirking their responsi- bilities. Combat: A smoke mephit's two clawed hands cause 1-2 points of damage each. Its breath weapon consists of a sooty ball and is usable every other melee round, an unlimited number of times per day. This sooty ball automatically strikes one creature of the mephits choice within 20’, causing 1-4 points of damage and blinding the victim for 1-2 rounds.
